paper_title: Materials and Methods of Karnezeika Cercopithecid Study

methods.description: Process for measuring dental specimens using digital calipers to ensure precision in the study of cercopithecid material.

steps.description: Linear measurements were taken with digital calipers at two decimals precision.
steps.searchable_summary: measure specimens using digital calipers with two decimal precision

methods.description: Creation of scatter plots to visualize the measurements of the dental specimens.

steps.description: Scatter plots were created with the use of LibreOffice Calc for Windows.
steps.searchable_summary: create scatter plots using LibreOffice Calc
